title: carpinus fargesiana
intro: Carpinus fargesiana, also known as Farges' hornbeam or Farges' birch, is a species of deciduous tree native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and inflammation, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Carpinus fargesiana include reducing pain and discomfort, relieving fever and swelling, and improving cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, with the leaves, bark, and roots being used to make various herbal preparations.
